nasb.text: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, five male lambs one year old. This was the offering of Elishama the son of Ammihud.

esv.text: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Elishama the son of Ammihud.

cnv.text: 作平安祭的，是兩頭公牛、五隻公綿羊、五隻公山羊、五隻一歲的公羊羔；這是亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪的供物。

ccb.text: 作平安祭的两头公牛、五只公绵羊、五只公山羊和五只一岁的公羊羔。
